title: cedrus deodara var. robusta
intro: Cedrus deodara var. robusta, also known as Himalayan cedar or Deodar cedar, is a variant of the native Indian tree species Cedrus deodara. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cedrus deodara var. robusta include reducing stress, improving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions due to its antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as essential oils and extracts, can be used to create teas, salves, and other remedies for its medicinal and health benefits.
